summary: P3 UI Enhancements Testing - All features verified successfully. Unit dropdown includes 'box' and 'packet' options. 'Add Another Item' button appears at bottom of line items list.

P3-10: Unit dropdown in ExecutionLedger.jsx includes 'packet' option

P3-11: 'Add Another Item' button appears at bottom of line items list when items exist
P3-11: Clicking 'Add Another Item' successfully adds a new line item
P3: Unit dropdown is functional and allows selection of 'box' unit
P3: Purchase Invoice modal opens correctly from Project Finance detail page
critical_code_review_comments: P3-10: UNITS array at line 100 correctly includes 'box' and 'packet': const UNITS = ['pcs', 'sqft', 'rft', 'kg', 'meter', 'set', 'nos', 'lot', 'box', 'packet']
P3-11: 'Add Another Item' button correctly placed at lines 1150-1157 with conditional rendering (form.items.length > 0)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 UI enhancements verified: 1) UNITS array in ExecutionLedger.jsx (line 100) includes 'box' and 'packet'. 2) 'Add Another Item' button (lines 1150-1157) appears at bottom of line items when items exist.
